en: Talking to me, you know, I have something for you. I was gonna save it for graduation
ko: 나한테 말하는 거지? 너에게 줄 게 있어. 졸업식 때 주려고 했는데

en: But after what you did, I think I'll give it to you now
ko: 네가 한 일 때문에 지금 줄게

en: Yo season tickets to the Clippers right courtside, haha, I
ko: 야, 클리퍼스 시즌 티켓, 코트 사이드야, 하하

en: There's something I need to tell you what is it
ko: 너한테 말해야 할 게 있어, 뭐야?

en: They were from my locker What?
Uncle Phil, I was just keeping them in case I needed them
ko: 필 삼촌, 필요할까 봐 그냥 두고 있었어

en: How could you be so stupid? You know, you shouldn't be messing with drugs. I know uncle Phil
ko: 어떻게 그렇게 멍청할 수 있어? 약물에 손대면 안 된다는 걸 알아야 해. 알아, 필 삼촌

en: I mean somebody gave them to me at school. I mean, I didn't mean for Carlton to take him
ko: 학교에서 누가 나한테 줬어. 칼튼이 먹게 하려던 건 아니야

en: I didn't even know if I was gonna take him. I'm sorry uncle Phil
ko: 내가 먹을지도 몰랐어. 미안해, 필 삼촌

en: My son could have died because of you
ko: 내 아들이 너 때문에 죽을 뻔했어
